philosophy_summary: Ordinary routines reveal moral weight when humor, dignity, and small choices share the same frame.
core_beliefs: Meaning lives in how people endure everyday pressure together.
Meals, errands, and pauses can carry more truth than declarations.
Warmth and melancholy should sit beside each other without being resolved too quickly.

scene_archetypes.name: 밥상 위의 거리감
scene_archetypes.meaning: A shared table exposes the emotional distance people can no longer hide.
scene_archetypes.philosophy_note: 일상의 가장 평범한 자리에서 관계의 진짜 온도가 드러나는 순간

scene_archetypes.name: 비켜갈 수 없는 선택
scene_archetypes.meaning: The decision matters because the situation stays ordinary while the heart becomes heavy.
scene_archetypes.philosophy_note: 거대한 사건이 아니라 평범한 상황이 사람을 더 어렵게 만든다
